forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 70. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 4pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny. High near 91, with temperatures falling to around 83 in the afternoon. West wind 8 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the shadows deepen across the city of Boston, a tranquil night envelops the streets, with the temperature settling comfortably around seventy degrees. The breeze whispers through the trees, soft and warm, offering a gentle embrace against the stillness of the evening. Just beyond the horizon, the promise of tomorrow beckons with hints of sunshine edging ever closer. Yet for now, the city cloaks itself in a calm clarity, hinting at the vibrant day that awaits.

When dawn breaks, Boston will greet Wednesday with a mixture of sunny splendor and a few flirtatious clouds. The air will warm to a near-scorching ninety-one degrees before the afternoon softens to a more manageable temperature around eighty-three. Light breezes from the west will sweep through, carrying with them the possibility of scattered showers and perhaps a rumble of thunder. As the day unfolds, a practicality in dressing is advised—a light layer will suffice for early warmth, but keep an umbrella at hand as the heavens may let loose in the afternoon. 

For those inclined to venture out, consider a stroll along the waterfront where the city breathes life into the day. Visit a quaint café, savoring the rich aroma of fresh coffee wafting in the air, or perhaps take solace in the serene embrace of a nearby park as the sun bathes everything in warmth. Whatever your choice, tomorrow promises to be a mixture of delightful sun and the wistful possibility of those purifying summer showers.
